Inicio previsto en seis meses

uncertainties: La capacidad operativa no está confirmada
risks: Planning remains exposed because la demanda no está medida.

results.rationale: The reconstruction uses only the frozen source packet and separates visible facts, assumptions, gaps, risks, privacy, and forbidden conclusions.
